subHeadline: Built on real data, verified by specialists, and completely independent — no sponsors, no bias, just honest advice.

signals.title: Built on Real Data
signals.description: Every reliability rating and cost range comes from genuine UK quote and enquiry data — not manufacturer marketing, not forum guesswork.

signals.title: We Tell You When Not to Repair
signals.description: Where replacement cost exceeds what the car is worth, we say so. That's the difference between a knowledge base and a sales page.

signals.title: Vetted JLR Specialists
signals.description: Every specialist in our network is vetted specifically for Land Rover and Range Rover work — not generalists who happen to take on JLR jobs.

signals.title: Part of Engine Finders
signals.description: LandRoverEngine.uk is part of the Engine Finders family, the UK's leading engine replacement marketplace — giving you the research depth of an independent authority with a vetted route to action when you need one.
